title: Time and distribution parameters: intervals and possible manipulation
scope: File: stack_wbnb.sol (balanceInterval, distributionInterval, lastPayout, distribute, dailyEstimate)
what_to_reason: Correctness of time arithmetic and susceptibility to miner/time manipulation
Granularity of `distributionInterval` (2 seconds) and gas costs for frequent distributions
Effects of `balanceInterval` on logging and potential spam or DoS via frequent calls
how_to_reason: Review uses of `now` and `safeSub` to ensure no negative arithmetic can underflow
Model attacker incentives to call `distribute()` at specific times or to manipulate `now` via block timestamp
Check gas implications and whether critical state updates are protected from repeated calls
edge_cases: Short `distributionInterval` allowing repeated calls to drain `dividendBalance_` via rounding
Timestamp drift exploited by miners to enlarge `profit` calculation
